Section 1  
Define the function with a list of dictionaries as input.  

Section 2  
Initialize a dictionary to store the most common improvement per age group.  

Section 3  
Iterate through each participant and their improvements.  

Section 4  
For each improvement, update the count in the dictionary.  

Section 5  
Determine the most common improvement for each age group.  

Section 6  
Return the dictionary with the most common improvements.  

* Count improvements per age group.  
* Select the most frequent improvement for each group.
